title: iceNslice's Simple Fireflies (textures)
description: The resource pack needed for Simple Fireflies to work as intended.
body:
![The project's banner featuring the title and a nighttime background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5950a91c29bdc72982a944025c11e7ec3fe86e11.png)

Simple Fireflies is a lightweight and performance firendly datapack which aims to brings back fireflies to Minecraft. The pack emulates what this feature could have been if Mojang went through with the idea:


- Fireflies will spawn in **appropriate biomes** at **night**...
- ...only if the **player is close to vegetation**...
- ...with **fully customisable settings** coming soon...
- ...and a **custom resource pack**!

This is the resource pack needed to turn the use particles into fireflies instead of ugly pixel blobs. **This pack alone wont make fireflies spawn.**
